sources.title: AI for Beginners
sources.description: Microsoft's open AI curriculum spanning symbolic and modern AI topics.

sources.title: Generative AI for Beginners
sources.description: Microsoft's open course on generative AI concepts and workflows.

sources.title: Hugging Face Course
sources.description: Modern NLP and transformer course content from Hugging Face.

sources.title: Hugging Face Agents Course
sources.description: Focused material on AI agents, tool use, and agent workflows.

sources.title: AIMA Python
sources.description: Algorithm-focused AI notebooks and explanations inspired by AIMA.

sources.title: GeeksforGeeks Artificial Intelligence Tutorial
sources.description: Broad AI overview with search, agents, knowledge representation, learning, and generative AI topics.

sources.title: Berkeley CS188 Textbook
sources.description: Official CS188 textbook covering core AI problem solving, reasoning, and learning topics.

sources.title: Full Stack LLM Bootcamp
sources.description: Practical notes on prompt engineering, retrieval, LLMOps, and shipping LLM-based systems.

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence: Foundations of Computational Agents
sources.description: A public AI textbook covering search, knowledge representation, and reasoning.
